2604.10507.title: Beyond Compliance: A Resistance-Informed Motivation Reasoning Framework for Challenging Psychological Client Simulation
2604.10507.paper_summary: Psychological client simulators have emerged as a scalable solution for training and evaluating counselor trainees and psychological LLMs. Yet existing simulators exhibit unrealistic over-compliance, leaving counselors underprepared for the challenging behaviors common in real-world practice. To bridge this gap, we present ResistClient, which systematically models challenging client behaviors grounded in Client Resistance Theory by integrating external behaviors with underlying motivational mechanisms. To this end, we propose Resistance-Informed Motivation Reasoning (RIMR), a two-stage training framework. First, RIMR mitigates compliance bias via supervised fine-tuning on RPC, a large-scale resistance-oriented psychological conversation dataset covering diverse client profiles. Second, beyond surface-level response imitation, RIMR models psychologically coherent motivation reasoning before response generation, jointly optimizing motivation authenticity and response consistency via process-supervised reinforcement learning. Extensive automatic and expert evaluations show that ResistClient substantially outperforms existing simulators in challenge fidelity, behavioral plausibility, and reasoning coherence. Moreover, ResistClient facilities evaluation of psychological LLMs under challenging conditions, offering new optimization directions for mental health dialogue systems.
2604.10507.paper_summary_zh: 心理客戶模擬器已成為訓練和評估輔導員實習生及心理 LLM 的可擴展解決方案。<lb/>然而，現有的模擬器表現出不切實際的過度遵從，讓輔導員在面對真實世界中常見的挑戰性行為時準備不足。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了 ResistClient，它系統性地基於客戶抵抗理論建模挑戰性客戶行為，通過整合外部行為與潛在的動機機制。<lb/>為此，我們提出了抵抗知情動機推理（RIMR），這是一個兩階段的訓練框架。<lb/>首先，RIMR 通過對 RPC 進行監督微調來減輕遵從偏見，RPC 是一個涵蓋多樣化客戶資料的大型抵抗導向心理對話數據集。<lb/>其次，RIMR 在回應生成之前，超越表層的回應模仿，建模心理上連貫的動機推理，通過過程監督強化學習共同優化動機真實性和回應一致性。<lb/>廣泛的自動和專家評估顯示，ResistClient 在挑戰真實性、行為合理性和推理一致性方面顯著優於現有的模擬器。<lb/>此外，ResistClient 促進了在挑戰性條件下對心理 LLM 的評估，為心理健康對話系統提供了新的優化方向。
2604.10507.author: Danni Liu et.al.
2604.10507.authors: Danni Liu, Bo Liu, Yuxin Hu, Hantao Zhao, Yan Liu, Ding Ding, Jiahui Jin, Jiuxin Cao
